Any review of this section must identify and flag this logical inversion.","R1.3":"The numerical evidence in Table 2 directly contradicts the claims built upon it; verifying that ablation conclusions follow from the reported numbers is central to reviewing an ablation study, making evidence-claim alignment a core expected responsibility here.","R1.6":"'Review this section' in an academic writing context inherently includes assessing prose clarity, sentence-level quality, and whether the narrative arc communicates experimental intent — making writing polish a central expected responsibility regardless of any technical focus."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review treat technical correctness (logical consistency of claims against reported numbers, evidence-claim alignment) as load-bearing, or is the primary goal writing polish and prose quality?"}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a direct internal contradiction: Table 2's pass@1 figures rank DevSwarm-NoCritique (76.8/69.5) > DevSwarm-Single (74.2/67.1) > DevSwarm-Full (71.4/64.8), yet the text asserts the full 3-round loop 'delivers the strongest results' and that removing the reviewer 'lowers pass@1 substantially.' Any review of this section must identify and flag this logical inversion.
rationale.R1.3: The numerical evidence in Table 2 directly contradicts the claims built upon it; verifying that ablation conclusions follow from the reported numbers is central to reviewing an ablation study, making evidence-claim alignment a core expected responsibility here.
rationale.R1.6: 'Review this section' in an academic writing context inherently includes assessing prose clarity, sentence-level quality, and whether the narrative arc communicates experimental intent — making writing polish a central expected responsibility regardless of any technical focus.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review treat technical correctness (logical consistency of claims against reported numbers, evidence-claim alignment) as load-bearing, or is the primary goal writing polish and prose quality?
